response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to geospatial data processing, but lacks direct experience with C++ and the specific technologies mentioned in the job description.
strengths: Experience with geospatial data processing through GISCollective
Strong background in software development with various technologies
Experience with Linux and open-source projects
concerns: No direct experience with C++ or Rust
Limited experience with navigation systems and routing data pipelines
Diverse tech stack experience may indicate lack of depth in specific areas
